name: Aria2 RPC
description: Remote control for aria2 download service via JSON-RPC 2.0 - add downloads, query status, pause/resume, remove tasks, and manage configurations for local or remote aria2 instances
author: Cortana
changelog: v0.0.2: Restructured documentation - moved detailed docs to references/, refined SKILL.md, added API_REFERENCE.md and USAGE.md
